issue_title: Pressing `command-return` shortcut to send request while focus is in a script pane still enters a newline character
issue_body:
### I have checked the following:

- [x] I have searched existing issues and found nothing related to my issue.

### This bug is:

- [ ] making Bruno unusable for me
- [x] slowing me down but I'm able to continue working
- [x] annoying
- [ ] this feature was working in a previous version but is broken in the current release.

### Bruno version

3.3.0

### Operating System

macOS 26.4.1

### Describe the bug

When focus is in a code editor (pre/post scripts) and you use the shortcut `command-return` to trigger a request send, a newline is still entered into the script editor.

### .bru file to reproduce the bug

It happens in all.

### Screenshots/Live demo link

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/15a9890e-e9e7-4a88-aa33-2c58f2570e2d
